args:

Asset metadata:
assetId: female_997__face_card__v001
profileId: female_997
shotType: face_card

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 21 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

Face details:
a soft oval face, medium-large calm eyes, a delicate jawline, a gentle quiet expression, naturally rounded face shape, medium-large eyes, neutral eye tilt, naturally defined jawline, subtle cheek fullness, natural medium nose bridge, soft fuller lips, natural brows, clear natural skin texture, realistic attractive appearance, balanced facial symmetry, clear natural skin, well-kept but not influencer-like, warm sporty mood.

Hair and styling:
long, natural dark brown, soft wavy hair with light natural bangs, natural makeup, soft mature romantic everyday fashion, slim-regular fit without being tight, campus-appropriate and modest. Outfit: cream sweatshirt with a simple collar detail.

Composition:
head-and-shoulders portrait, face clearly visible, looking near the camera with a natural relaxed expression, simple warm off-white or campus-neutral background, not a studio portrait.

Lighting and camera:
soft natural daylight, realistic smartphone camera photo, 35mm equivalent lens, slight depth of field, natural skin texture, highly realistic but casual.

Avoid: childlike appearance, teenager, school uniform, idol trainee look, celebrity lookalike, influencer photoshoot, glamour studio lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, exaggerated beauty filter, revealing outfit, swimsuit, lingerie, nightclub, party scene, neon lighting, sexualized pose, luxury hotel background, identifiable school logo, visible real university name, text, watermark, distorted face, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic body proportions.

Rules:
- one image only
- no text in image
- no watermark
- no logo
- adult Korean university student
- realistic, calm, trustworthy
- not influencer-like
- not school uniform
- not childlike

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 21 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

height impression around 161cm, medium frame, average build with a soft natural body line, natural muscularity, medium shoulder width, straight natural waist line, narrow hip line, balanced leg proportion, balanced torso length, realistic adult head-to-body ratio, realistic adult body proportions, natural posture. Composition:
three-quarter body or full-body photo, standing or walking naturally, body proportions readable, no oversized padding, no extreme wide-angle distortion, camera at chest height, enough space around the body.

Location:
quiet university walkway with trees and neutral campus buildings in the background, no visible school logo, no readable text.

Lighting and camera:
soft daylight, realistic smartphone profile photo, natural colors, casual but carefully composed.
